title: Head Teacher
description: Responsible for overall school leadership

title: Deputy Head Teacher
description: Supports head teacher; takes charge in absence

title: Assistant Head Teacher
description: Manages specific areas like KS1 or curriculum

title: Phase Leader
description: Oversees a phase grouping such as EYFS or KS2

title: Class Teacher
description: Lead instructor for assigned class

title: Teaching Assistant
description: Supports lead teachers across classroom activities

title: Learning Support Assistant
description: Specialises in supporting SEN pupils and learning interventions

title: Higher Level Teaching Assistant
description: Delivers learning under teacher supervision, may lead sessions

title: Specialist
description: Teaches specific subjects (e.g. STEM, Arts)

title: SENCO
description: Special Educational Needs Coordinator

title: Cover Supervisor
description: Oversees class when teacher is absent; limited instruction

title: Pastoral Mentor
description: Focuses on pupil wellbeing and behavioral growth

title: Inclusion Lead
description: Handles SEN, safeguarding, and inclusive support

title: Coordinator
description: Manages programs like STEM week or parent outreach

title: Office Administrator
description: Handles daily office tasks and pupil records

title: Office Manager
description: Oversees school office admin and staff coordination

title: Midday Supervisor
description: Monitors pupils during lunch and recess periods

title: Caretaker
description: Maintains premises, security and facility upkeep

title: Attendance Officer
description: Monitors and manages pupil attendance records

title: Exams Officer
description: Oversees testing logistics and data reporting

title: Librarian
description: Manages resources, reading programs and library space

title: IT Technician
description: Supports staff and pupils with technical devices and systems

title: Learning Mentor
description: One-to-one pupil support for emotional or behavioral challenges

title: Early Years Practitioner
description: Specialised in Foundation phase and play-based learning
